test_cases.description: Pitch +90 with yaw 45 (should point up regardless)
Pitch -90 with yaw 45 (should point down regardless)
Pitch +90 with yaw 90 (should point up regardless)
Pitch -90 with yaw 90 (should point down regardless)
Pitch +90 with yaw 135 (should point up regardless)
Pitch -90 with yaw 135 (should point down regardless)
Pitch +90 with yaw 180 (should point up regardless)
Pitch -90 with yaw 180 (should point down regardless)

Pitch -90 with yaw 225 (should point down regardless)
Pitch +90 with yaw 270 (should point up regardless)
Pitch -90 with yaw 270 (should point down regardless)
Pitch +90 with yaw 315 (should point up regardless)
Pitch -90 with yaw 315 (should point down regardless)
Pitch -91 (out of valid range, tests clamping behavior)
Pitch -100 (out of valid range, tests clamping behavior)
Pitch -180 (out of valid range, tests clamping behavior)

Pitch 100 (out of valid range, tests clamping behavior)
